return hasattr(dispatch_output, \"origin_topk_ids\")\n\n\ndef _resolve_mori_quant_type(\n    dispatch_a1_dtype: torch.dtype,\n    dispatch_scale: Optional[torch.Tensor],\n    weight_quant: AiterQuantType,\n) -> AiterQuantType:\n    \"\"\"Pick the activation quant_type for AITER when the dispatch path may have\n    pre-quantized hidden_states. Mirrors the original MoriEPMoE.run_moe_core\n    decision tree.\"\"\"\n    is_fp8_quant = weight_quant in (\n        AiterQuantType.PER_128X128,\n        AiterQuantType.PER_TOKEN,\n    )\n    is_w4a4 = weight_quant == AiterQuantType.PER_1X32\n    is_fp4_dispatch = dispatch_a1_dtype == torch.float4_e2m1fn_x2\n    has_dispatch_scale = dispatch_scale is not None\n\n    if is_w4a4:\n        # W4A4 weights always run as per_1x32; caller should ``continue`` (handled or skipped),\n    False otherwise.  No-op when ``pp_group.world_size == 1``.\n\n    Handles three concerns in order:\n      1. Drop transformer-layer weights outside [start_layer, end_layer).\n      2. Route the tied ``embed_tokens.weight`` to ``lm_head`` on the last\n         rank (under PP, embed and lm_head live on different ranks so they\n         can't be tied via module aliasing).\n      3. TODO: reuse the buffer across layers\n        attn_out = getattr(forward_batch, \"_attn_output\", None)\n        if attn_out is not None:\n            o = attn_out\n        elif layer.qk_head_dim != layer.v_head_dim:\n            o = q.new_empty((q.shape[0], layer.tp_q_head_num * layer.v_head_dim))\n        else:\n            o = torch.empty_like(q)\n\n        if k is None and v is None:\n            pool = self.token_to_kv_pool\n            cache_loc = forward_batch.out_cache_loc\n            if isinstance(pool, SWAKVPool) and pool.layers_mapping[layer.layer_id][1]:\n                cache_loc = pool.translate_loc_from_full_to_swa(cache_loc)\n            k_buffer, v_buffer = pool.get_kv_buffer(layer.layer_id)\n            k = k_buffer[cache_loc]\n            v = v_buffer[cache_loc]\n        elif k is None or v is None:\n            raise ValueError(\"Both k and v should be None or not None\")\n        else:\n            #
